title: Wedding BBQ Recipes: Grilled Corn and More
meta_description: Grilled corn and other BBQ recipes for weddings made easy with the Girla corn holders. Keep cobs secure and guests happy.
html:
Wedding BBQs need crowd-pleasing sides that are as stress-free as they are tasty. Grilled corn on the cob is a classic, but handling it without burning your fingers or losing the butter can be a hassle. Enter the Girla Interlocking Corn on the Cob Holders: silicone grips let you butter, season, and serve grilled corn with flair—no skewers required. Here’s how to turn this gadget into a party staple, along with other BBQ recipes that’ll keep your wedding menu memorable.

Why Grilled Corn Belongs on Your Wedding Menu

There’s a reason every backyard cookout needs grilled corn. It’s sweet, smoky, and adaptable—perfect for casual wedding BBQs or upscale summer weddings. The trick is keeping the corn juicy while avoiding soggy, butter-slicked messes. The Girla corn holders solve both problems. Their interlocking design keeps cobs upright on the grill, allowing even charring, and the heat-resistant silicone handles let you work with confidence.

Wedding BBQ Recipes Grilled Corn: Pro Tips

1. **Prep Ahead**: Shuck corn, remove silks completely, and toss with oil before grilling. The Girla holders make this easier—no more fumbling with slippery cobs.

2. **Grill Low and Slow**: Set up a two-zone fire (hot and cool sides) to avoid burning. Cook corn over medium heat for 15–20 minutes, turning occasionally.

3. **Add Flavor**: Brush with a mix of melted butter, lime zest, and chili powder. For extra sweetness, try a honey-butter glaze.

4. **Serve with Style**: Use the holders’ interlocking feature to stack grilled corn vertically at the buffet—a tidy, Instagram-ready display.

Other Wedding BBQ Staples to Pair with Grilled Corn

Grilled corn shines best when surrounded by other hearty, make-ahead dishes. Here are a few wedding BBQ recipes to build your menu:

  • Smoky Chicken Skewers with a honey-mustard glaze
  • Charred Peach Salad with arugula and prosciutto
  • BBQ Pulled Pork Sliders in mini buns
  • Grilled Veggie Planks (zucchini, bell peppers, onions)
  • Sparkling Cucumber-Mint Agua Fresca

Why Use Corn Holders Over Traditional Skewers?

Traditional skewers force you to cut corn off the cob, losing the presentation and flavor. The Girla Interlocking Corn on the Cob Holders let you serve whole cobs, which guests devour faster. Plus, they’re:

  • Dishwasher-safe for easy cleanup
  • Heat-resistant up to 500°F
  • Stackable for storing in drawers or shipping to the venue
  • Reusable for every future cookout

FAQ

Can the Girla corn holders go on the grill directly?

Absolutely. The silicone handles are heat-resistant and won’t melt over medium-high heat.

How many cobs can I hold at once?

Each holder secures one cob, and the set includes five pairs (10 total), letting you grill multiple cobs simultaneously.

Are these good for events besides weddings?

Perfect for Fourth of July BBQs, family reunions, or tailgates. Anytime you need to serve corn in bulk without chaos.
